summary: Iteration 96 - Entity Resolution Engine testing complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. All entity resolution endpoints functional: POST /api/document-intelligence/resolve-entities/{id} (resolves customer, vendor, PO#, invoice# from extracted fields), GET /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{id} (returns stored resolutions), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{resolution_id} (manual override with original_resolution preservation). Entity resolution enrichment in GET /api/document-intelligence/{id} returns entity_resolution_status, blocking_items, unresolved/ambiguous counts. Auto-draft gating blocks when entity_resolution_status=blocked. Frontend: Entity Resolution section displays in DocumentIntelligencePanel with status badges, candidate lists, confirm buttons, and manual override inputs.

ui_bugs.issue: Nested button inside button in Entity Resolution section (button inside onClick handler button)

issues: Minor console warning about <tr>/<span> hydration - cosmetic only

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/resolve-entities/{id} returns 404 when no intelligence result exists
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/resolve-entities/{id} returns resolutions array and summary with status, blocking_items, unresolved_count, ambiguous_count
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{id} returns all stored resolution results for a document
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{id} returns empty list for document without entity resolution
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{resolution_id} returns 404 for non-existent resolution_id
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{resolution_id} preserves original_resolution for audit
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/{id} returns entity_resolution_status, entity_resolution_blocking_items, unresolved_entity_count, ambiguous_entity_count
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} blocks when entity_resolution_status=blocked
Backend: Review queue includes entity_resolution_status, unresolved_entity_count, ambiguous_entity_count fields
Backend: Resolution statuses are valid (matched, ambiguous, unmatched, corrected)
Backend: Confidence values are in valid range [0, 1] and corrected resolutions have confidence=1.0
Backend: Ambiguous resolutions have multiple candidate matches
Backend: Iteration 95 - Auto-draft endpoint still works
Backend: Iteration 95 - Process endpoint still works
Backend: Iteration 95 - Review queue endpoint still works
Backend: Iteration 95 - Summary endpoint still works
Frontend: Document Intelligence Review Queue page loads with summary cards (7 processed, 6 ready, 0 needs review, 1 blocked)
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel shows Entity Resolution section with resolve/re-resolve button
Frontend: Entity Resolution section shows resolution status badges (Matched/Ambiguous/Unmatched/Corrected)
Frontend: Ambiguous resolutions show candidate list with Confirm buttons
Frontend: Unmatched resolutions show manual override input fields (Entity ID, Name)
Frontend: Auto-Draft Blocked notice shows blocking items when entity_resolution_status=blocked
Frontend: Draft Created section shows created draft type and ID
action_items: Optional: Fix nested button warning in DocumentIntelligencePanel.js Entity Resolution section (button inside button causing hydration warning)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service: /app/backend/services/entity_resolution_service.py - Well-structured with layered resolution strategy (exact -> normalized -> fuzzy -> reference lookup)
Backend: _compute_resolution_summary properly computes overall status (blocked if unresolved, needs_review if ambiguous, resolved otherwise)
Backend: correct_resolution preserves original_resolution for audit trail and re-computes document-level entity_resolution_status
Backend: Auto-draft gating in document_intelligence_service.py create_auto_draft() step 4 correctly blocks when entity_resolution_status=blocked
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel.js Entity Resolution section has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend: DocumentReviewQueuePage.js correctly shows entity resolution badges in Reasons column

seed_data_created.entity_resolutions: 4 resolutions for doc 80c7ab51 (customer ambiguous, vendor unmatched, PO matched, invoice ambiguous), 3 resolutions for doc e4624c82 (customer matched, vendor unmatched, invoice ambiguous)
seed_data_created.activities: entity_resolution_issues activity records created for documents with resolution issues

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 96 - Entity Resolution Engine fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/document-intelligence/resolve-entities/{id} (resolves entities), GET /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{id} (get resolutions), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/resolution/{resolution_id} (manual correction). Resolution statuses: matched, ambiguous, unmatched, corrected. Entity kinds: customer, vendor, purchase_order, invoice. Intelligence result enriched with entity_resolution_status, entity_resolution_blocking_items, unresolved_entity_count, ambiguous_entity_count. Auto-draft gating blocks when entity_resolution_status=blocked. Key data-testids: entity-resolution-section, resolve-entities-btn, resolution-{id}, confirm-candidate-{id}-{index}, manual-id-{id}, manual-name-{id}, manual-resolve-btn-{id}, er-blocked-notice. Documents with entity resolution: 80c7ab51 (4 resolutions), e4624c82 (3 resolutions, blocked status). Collections: entity_resolutions, document_intelligence_results, activities.

features: Candidate list with Confirm buttons for ambiguous resolutions
Manual override inputs (Entity ID, Name) for unmatched resolutions

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API (BC sandbox) operates in DEMO MODE. Email service is MOCKED (in-memory).
